generated_sql_tests:
<test_cases>
  <test_case id="1">
    <description>Deparse an INSERT rule whose action uses an explicit target-table alias.</description>
    <sql>
-- Setup
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_src CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_log CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE ex_rule_src (id int, note text);
CREATE TABLE ex_rule_log (id int, note text);
CREATE RULE ex_rule_insert AS
  ON INSERT TO ex_rule_src
  DO ALSO INSERT INTO ex_rule_log AS log_alias VALUES (NEW.id, NEW.note);

-- Execution
SELECT pg_get_ruledef(oid) FROM pg_rewrite WHERE rulename = 'ex_rule_insert';

-- Teardown
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_src CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_log CASCADE;
    </sql>
  </test_case>
  <test_case id="2">
    <description>Deparse an UPDATE rule with aliased DML target table in the rule action.</description>
    <sql>
-- Setup
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_src CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_log CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE ex_rule_src (id int primary key, note text);
CREATE TABLE ex_rule_log (id int primary key, note text);
INSERT INTO ex_rule_log VALUES (1, 'old');
CREATE RULE ex_rule_update AS
  ON UPDATE TO ex_rule_src
  DO ALSO UPDATE ex_rule_log AS log_alias SET note = NEW.note WHERE log_alias.id = NEW.id;

-- Execution
SELECT pg_get_ruledef(oid) FROM pg_rewrite WHERE rulename = 'ex_rule_update';

-- Teardown
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_src CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_log CASCADE;
    </sql>
  </test_case>
  <test_case id="3">
    <description>Deparse a DELETE rule with aliased DML target table in the rule action.</description>
    <sql>
-- Setup
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_src CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_log CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE ex_rule_src (id int primary key, note text);
CREATE TABLE ex_rule_log (id int primary key, note text);
INSERT INTO ex_rule_log VALUES (1, 'to delete');
CREATE RULE ex_rule_delete AS
  ON DELETE TO ex_rule_src
  DO ALSO DELETE FROM ex_rule_log AS log_alias WHERE log_alias.id = OLD.id;

-- Execution
SELECT pg_get_ruledef(oid) FROM pg_rewrite WHERE rulename = 'ex_rule_delete';

-- Teardown
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_src CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ex_rule_log CASCADE;
    </sql>
  </test_case>
</test_cases>
